title: Private Boat Party in Marbella: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Throwing a private boat party in Marbella offers an unforgettable way to explore the Costa del Sol, with departures from Puerto Banús and prices starting around €3,000 for a half-day charter. Whether you are celebrating a birthday or hosting clients, BoatHire24 connects you with verified skippers and vessels for a bespoke experience.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a private party in Marbella?

Prices vary by vessel size and duration, but expect to pay from €3,000 for a half-day charter on a premium motor yacht. Smaller boats such as an Axopar 37 can be hired for around €1,500 for four hours, while a spacious catamaran like a Lagoon 46 costs from €4,500 for a full day. Crewed superyachts with catering exceed €10,000. For a detailed price breakdown and to compare options, consider a yacht charter in Marbella through BoatHire24, which lists dozens of vessels with transparent pricing.

Where do you set off from in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers several departure points, with Puerto Banús being the most famous hub for luxury charters. This marina is home to superyachts and provides easy access to the Mediterranean. Other options include Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, a smaller marina near the old town, and Cabopino Marina south of Marbella, which is quieter and closer to the Cabopino dunes. For a longer trip, you can set sail towards the nearby town of Estepona, about 10 nautical miles west, or head east to the exclusive resort of Sotogrande. Many charters also include the scenic coast towards the Sierra Blanca mountains, offering stunning views of the Azimut and Fairline yachts moored in the bay.

Which boat should you rent for a party in Marbella?

The best choice depends on your party size and desired amenities, ranging from sporty open boats to spacious flybridges. Here is a list of popular options:

  1. Sunseeker Predator 72, ideal for a stylish party of up to 12 guests with a large aft deck and tender; from €6,000 for four hours. For full details, visit the Sunseeker Predator 72 charter page.
  2. Azimut 58, a flybridge motor yacht sleeping 10 overnight, perfect for longer celebrations; from €4,500 per day.
  3. Lagoon 46, a catamaran with stable deck space, suitable for up to 12 guests; from €4,000 for a full day.
  4. Axopar 37, a versatile open boat for up to 10, great for watersports and coastal cruising; from €1,500 for a half-day.
  5. Astondoa 70, a Spanish-built motor yacht offering luxury for 14 guests with crew; from €7,000 for eight hours.

Costs for a private boat party in Marbella

Budgets vary widely, but here is a typical price band breakdown to help you plan.

  • Shared group tour (if available): from €150 per person for a 4-hour trip on a catamaran.
  • Small motorboat half-day (Axopar or similar, no crew): €1,500 to €2,500.
  • Catamaran full-day (crewed, for up to 12): €4,000 to €6,000.
  • Large crewed yacht (Sunseeker, Azimut or Astondoa, full day): €6,000 to €12,000.

When is the best season and do you need a licence?

The peak season for boat parties in Marbella runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind moderates the heat. In summer, temperatures reach 30°C and sea conditions are generally calm. For self-drive boats under a certain power, a recreational licence is required; the operator will confirm exact requirements based on your nationality. Many charter companies recommend hiring a skipper, which is often included in the price.

For a party with a difference, book a sunset cruise leaving Puerto Banús at 19:00 in July, you will see the sun sink behind the Sierra Blanca while the sea temperature is still 24°C. No wind, just perfect stillness.

At a glance

  • Price range: €1,500 to €12,000 for a private party charter.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Typical trip length: 4 to 8 hours.
  • Maximum guest capacity: 12 to 14 on most charter yachts.
  • Currency: EUR.
  • Distance to Estepona: 10 nautical miles west of Marbella.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I bring my own food and drink on a boat party?

Most charters allow you to bring your own catering, though some require you to use their onboard service.

Is it possible to anchor for swimming during the party?

Yes, skippers often stop at sheltered coves near Cabopino or the Marbella coast for swimming and paddleboarding.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day?

Charters typically run unless a storm warning is issued; you can reschedule or receive a refund according to the operator's policy.

Are children allowed on private boat parties in Marbella?

Yes, children are welcome on most boats, but life jackets must be worn and the skipper will advise on safety.

To book your private boat party in Marbella, browse verified listings on the BoatHire24 marketplace, where you can compare prices, read reviews and secure your preferred date. Boat owners are also invited to list their vessels and reach thousands of potential guests worldwide. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. With 2026 already shaping up to be a busy season, early booking is wise to secure the best yachts at Puerto Banús.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
